title: Swift Public Libraries Steward Role Work
summary: Reusable wrkstrm-finance workstream template for public Swift library stewardship.
instructions: Use this template when instantiating concrete public-library stewardship work.
Preserve source compatibility unless a versioned migration is approved.
Keep DocC, tests, and service boundaries aligned with the real Swift package surface.
outcomes: Public Swift library APIs are documented, tested, and coherent.
Broker service boundaries remain legible to downstream consumers.

tasks.text: Refactor PublicLib to mirror the OmniBroker/TradierLib domain-oriented service structure.
Introduce per-domain folders under Sources/PublicLib for quote, order, activity, positions, profile, auth, and streaming surfaces as supported.
Move domain methods into PublicClient extensions and move Codable models and request types into matching domain folders.
Add minimal DocC articles and tutorials mirroring the TradierLib pattern.
Verify swift build and targeted tests before treating the stewardship pass as complete.
